scene_summary: A dense expressionist bloom of translucent pink and cream petals, perforated stamp edges, gridded image wells, black feed cuts, pale receipt strips, beads, and torn vellum scraps. The interface can attach to the visible apertures, slits, knots, beads, and perforated paper islands embedded in the flower mass.
usable_surfaces: large circular gridded red-pink aperture at upper left
broad translucent pink peony fold across lower center
narrow black ink cut on diagonal clear ribbon
sharp diagonal slit through central bloom seam
pale perforated receipt strip near lower left center
small vellum scrap tucked below central petal edge
teal glossy bead in left bloom fold
perforated stamp notch along lower red image well
small dark edge node in right open cream field

complexity_assessment.rationale: The plate has strong source-bearing surfaces, but the layered petals, perforations, beads, gridded wells, and black cuts make it visually dense rather than minimal.

mapping_note: Package assembly filled unmapped source pockets from planned artifact surfaces because plate inspection returned too few detected objects.
